---
title: "Fig2"
format: html
editor: visual
---

### panel 2B

Generate MSA figure

```{bash}
CIAlign --infile Histone_Curated_Alignment_Unique_Ids_HFD.fasta --outfile HFD --plot_consensus_similarity --plot_format svg --plot_similarity_palette viridis
```

### Ccmpute stats

```{python}
python alignment_identity.py Histone_Curated_Alignment_Unique_Ids_NTERM_revised.fasta
```

### panel 2C

```{r}
# Load required package
library(ggplot2)

# Read the rate table
tab <- read.table("panel_C/Histone_Curated_Alignment_Unique_Ids_cenH3_nopartition.rate", header = TRUE)

# Preview the first few rows
#head(tab)

# Check column names and rename if needed
# If column names are not "Site" and "Rate", set them manually:
# colnames(tab) <- c("Site", "Rate")

# Add site numbers if not included
if (!"Site" %in% colnames(tab)) {
  tab$Site <- seq_len(nrow(tab))
  colnames(tab)[1] <- "Rate"
}

# Plot using ggplot2
ggplot(tab, aes(x = Site, y = Rate)) +
  geom_line(color = "steelblue") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
  labs(
    title = "CenH3 (full no partition) \nPosterior Mean Site-Specific Substitution Rates",
    x = "Site Position",
    y = "Relative Rate"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14)

#ggsave("sites_rates/CenH3_wo_partition_site_rates_plot.pdf", width = 10, height = 4)
```
